product_profile.name: Clear MagSafe-Compatible iPhone 15 Case with Raised Bezels and Air-Cushion Corners
key_features: transparent clear back to show original phone color
slim TPU and polycarbonate hybrid body

specs.suitable_ages: iPhone 15 users, students, commuters, gift buyers
specs.materials: TPU bumper and polycarbonate clear back
specs.package_contents: phone case, protective film, instruction card
specs.certifications: supplier to confirm RoHS/REACH material compliance
specs.colors: clear, frosted clear, clear black edge

product_profile.supplier_name: Demo supplier from 1688 search: MagSafe phone case factory
product_profile.key_selling_point: A slim clear iPhone 15 case that keeps the phone color visible while adding MagSafe and everyday drop protection.
product_profile.differentiation_direction: Differentiate around anti-yellowing clarity, stronger magnetic hold, and visible raised camera protection.
product_profile.target_audience: iPhone 15 users who want a clear case for daily commuting without hiding the phone color.
product_profile.visual_style: Clean tech accessory look, transparent material close-ups, MagSafe ring and camera-lip detail.

image_needs.requirement: Transparent clear MagSafe-compatible iPhone 15 case with white magnetic ring, raised camera bezel, air-cushion corners, floating on a clean light gray background, professional product photography, high detail
Infographic-style product photo of clear iPhone 15 case showing MagSafe magnetic ring, raised screen lip, camera protection, air-cushion corners, anti-yellowing clear back, clean labels, high detail
Lifestyle photo of a commuter holding a blue iPhone 15 in a clear MagSafe case near a cafe table with wireless charger and keys, natural daylight, realistic tech accessory scene

versions.title: 透明手机壳别只看颜值
versions.body: 换 iPhone 15 后我一直想找透明壳，但很多壳要么发黄快，要么镜头那里保护不够。这款是透明背板加 TPU 边框，能露出手机原色，背后还有 MagSafe 磁吸圈，车载支架和无线充都方便。四角做了缓冲结构，屏幕和镜头边缘也有加高，日常通勤放包里更安心。它不是那种厚重防摔壳，胜在清爽、轻、该保护的地方都有。

versions.title: 终于找到清爽透明壳
versions.body: 我买蓝色 iPhone 15 就是不想把颜色藏起来，所以手机壳一直选透明款。这个壳背面是清透的，能看到原机颜色，MagSafe 圈也能直接吸车载支架。平时放桌上最怕刮镜头，它的镜头边缘有加高，屏幕面也有一点保护。四个角是缓冲设计，拿在手里不笨重。适合想要清爽外观，又不想裸机冒险的人。

faq_list.Q_zh: 这个是 iPhone 15 还是 15 Pro 用的？
faq_list.A_zh: 这款样例定位是 iPhone 15，购买前请确认具体型号，15/15 Pro 开孔不同。
faq_list.Q_en: Is this for iPhone 15 or 15 Pro?
faq_list.A_en: This sample is for iPhone 15. Please confirm your exact model because 15 and 15 Pro cases differ.

faq_list.A_zh: 支持，背部带磁吸圈，可配合 MagSafe 充电器、车载支架等配件使用。
faq_list.A_en: Yes, it has a magnetic ring for MagSafe chargers, mounts, and compatible accessories.

faq_list.A_zh: 透明壳长期使用都会有发黄风险，建议选择抗黄材料并避免长期暴晒。
faq_list.A_en: Clear cases may yellow over time. Anti-yellowing material and avoiding long sun exposure help slow it down.

sample_replies.reply: 这款是 iPhone 15 用的，15 Pro 的按键和镜头开孔不一样，购买前一定要确认手机型号。

pain_points.typical_quote: 买错了，15 Pro 不能用。
pain_points.fix: Put model compatibility warning in title, first image, and FAQ.

pain_points.pain: Clear case yellowing expectations need management.
pain_points.typical_quote: 用了几个月边框开始黄。
pain_points.fix: Avoid permanent anti-yellowing claims; explain material and care tips.

phase_1.impact: Reduce returns and clarify product fit

phase_2.impact: Improve durability perception and repeat purchase

invalid_points: Do not sell one SKU as compatible with multiple iPhone models unless verified.
new_insights: Compatibility clarity is as important as protection claims.
loopback.next_selection_adjustment: Prioritize SKUs with exact model molding, stronger magnet specs, and anti-yellowing test data.

next_research_seed.recommended_keyword: iPhone 15 clear MagSafe case anti yellowing raised camera bezel
next_research_seed.new_target_audience: iPhone 15 users who want to show original phone color with everyday MagSafe protection.
next_research_seed.price_band_adjustment: Retail around $12.99-19.99; premium only with verified magnets and material tests.
